summary: Iteration 12: Backend APIs (5/5 passed) + Static code verification (14/14 passed) for fullscreen player implementation using expo-av Video component. All features verified correctly implemented.

frontend_issues.note: React Native Expo app - frontend verified via static code analysis. Web preview intermittently unavailable due to ngrok tunnel issues (infrastructure, not code).

critical_code_review_comments: live.tsx: VERIFIED - Uses expo-av Video component with single instance for both inline and fullscreen modes
live.tsx: VERIFIED - isFullscreen state toggles container style (previewContainer vs fullscreenContainer)
live.tsx: VERIFIED - goFullscreen() sets isFullscreen(true) and hides tab bar
live.tsx: VERIFIED - exitFullscreen() sets isFullscreen(false) and shows tab bar
live.tsx: VERIFIED - Screen ratio control with FIT/FILL/STRETCH (ResizeMode.CONTAIN/COVER/STRETCH)
live.tsx: VERIFIED - Orientation listener: LANDSCAPE_LEFT/RIGHT → setIsFullscreen(true), portrait → setIsFullscreen(false)
live.tsx: VERIFIED - BackHandler for Android back button calls exitFullscreen() and returns true
live.tsx: VERIFIED - Tab bar hide/show via navigation.getParent()?.setOptions({ tabBarStyle })
live.tsx: VERIFIED - All testIDs present: live-video-player, fs-back-btn, fs-ratio-btn, inline-fullscreen-btn
player.tsx: VERIFIED - Multiview button pauses player before navigation (player.pause())
multiview.tsx: VERIFIED - 2x2 grid with VideoView, category picker modal, volume-based audio routing (isActive ? 1 : 0)
tabs/_layout.tsx: VERIFIED - Portrait lock on mount via ScreenOrientation.lockAsync(PORTRAIT_UP)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All fullscreen features VERIFIED IMPLEMENTED: 1) Single expo-av Video component toggles between inline preview and fullscreen via container style changes. 2) goFullscreen/exitFullscreen callbacks properly set isFullscreen state. 3) Screen ratio control cycles through FIT/FILL/STRETCH modes. 4) Orientation listener handles landscape→fullscreen, portrait→exit. 5) Tab bar hides in fullscreen, shows when exiting. 6) BackHandler for Android back button. Backend APIs all working: /api/health, /api/live/categories, /api/live/streams, /api/stream/url. Web preview has intermittent ngrok tunnel issues (infrastructure, not code).

verified_features.feature: Single Video component for inline and fullscreen
verified_features.evidence: live.tsx uses expo-av Video with isFullscreen conditional for container style
fs-ratio-btn testID with cycleResizeMode function cycling through ResizeMode.CONTAIN/COVER/STRETCH
goFullscreen sets tabBarStyle: { display: 'none' }, exitFullscreen sets tabBarStyle: undefined
addOrientationChangeListener with LANDSCAPE_LEFT/RIGHT → setIsFullscreen(true), portrait → setIsFullscreen(false)

verified_endpoints.notes: Returns streams array with stream_id, name

infrastructure_notes: Expo tunnel has intermittent ngrok issues (ERR_NGROK_334 - endpoint already online). This is an infrastructure issue, not a code issue. The app requires a mobile device or emulator for full UI testing.
